text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My skin seems to be missing some of its usual
luster.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let me think... It must have been from last night.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El was so enthusiastic about that ultra-hot sauce,
I ended up sampling it despite myself...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: But it was far spicier than I imagined. Sigh... I should be more wary of trying things outside of my comfort zone.
